collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (3 total Queries, 3 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: select componentID,callerID,dataViewID from tb_dataview where componentID = 33 and callerID = 2 and name = 'SELECCIONAR_ITEM_BILLING'  and isActive= 1

select companyID,componentID,callerID,dataViewID,companyDataViewID,name,description,sqlScript,visibleColumns,nonVisibleColumns,isActive from tb_company_dataview where companyID = 2 and componentID = 33 and callerID = 2 and dataViewID = 41 and isActive = 1

select 
	distinct 
	lp.listPriceID,
	lp.startOn,
	lp.endOn,
	p.typePriceID,
	ci.display,
	i.itemID,
	i.unitMeasureID	,
	i.cost ,
	i.quantity ,
	i.quantityMax,
	i.quantityMin,
	iw.cost as iwCost,
	iw.quantityMax as iwQuantityMax,
	iw.quantityMin as iwQuantityMin ,
	p.percentage ,
	p.price as BPrecio,
        i.isInvoiceQuantityZero as isInvoiceQuantityZero,
	i.itemNumber as Codigo,
	i.name as Nombre,
	i.barCode as Barra,
	cic.display as 'Medida',
	iw.quantity as Cantidad,
	p.price as Precio 	
from 
	tb_list_price lp 
	inner join tb_price p on 
		lp.listPriceID = p.listPriceID and 
		lp.companyID = p.companyID
	inner join tb_catalog_item ci on 
		p.typePriceID = ci.catalogItemID 
	inner join tb_item i on 
		p.itemID = i.itemID and 
		p.companyID = i.companyID 
	inner join tb_catalog_item cic on 
		i.unitMeasureID = cic.catalogItemID 
	inner join tb_item_warehouse iw on 
		i.itemID = iw.itemID and 
		i.companyID = iw.companyID 
where
       i.isActive = 1 and 
        (
               ( iw.quantity > 0 and i.isInvoiceQuantityZero = 0 ) || 
               i.isInvoiceQuantityZero = 1 
        ) and 
	lp.companyID = 2 and 
	( 
                  (p.typePriceID = 154  and 154 != 0 ) or 
                  ( 154 = 0  )  
        )  and 
	lp.listPriceID = 12 and 
	(
             (iw.warehouseID = 4  and 4 != 0 )  or 
             (4 = 0 )
        )
order by 
     i.itemID desc

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query:
select 
	distinct 
	lp.listPriceID,
	lp.startOn,
	lp.endOn,
	p.typePriceID,
	ci.display,
	i.itemID,
	i.unitMeasureID	,
	i.cost ,
	i.quantity ,
	i.quantityMax,
	i.quantityMin,
	iw.cost as iwCost,
	iw.quantityMax as iwQuantityMax,
	iw.quantityMin as iwQuantityMin ,
	p.percentage ,
	p.price as BPrecio,
        i.isInvoiceQuantityZero as isInvoiceQuantityZero,
	i.itemNumber as Codigo,
	i.name as Nombre,
	i.barCode as Barra,
	cic.display as 'Medida',
	iw.quantity as Cantidad,
	p.price as Precio 	
from 
	tb_list_price lp 
	inner join tb_price p on 
		lp.listPriceID = p.listPriceID and 
		lp.companyID = p.companyID
	inner join tb_catalog_item ci on 
		p.typePriceID = ci.catalogItemID 
	inner join tb_item i on 
		p.itemID = i.itemID and 
		p.companyID = i.companyID 
	inner join tb_catalog_item cic on 
		i.unitMeasureID = cic.catalogItemID 
	inner join tb_item_warehouse iw on 
		i.itemID = iw.itemID and 
		i.companyID = iw.companyID 
where
       i.isActive = 1 and 
        (
               ( iw.quantity > 0 and i.isInvoiceQuantityZero = 0 ) || 
               i.isInvoiceQuantityZero = 1 
        ) and 
	lp.companyID = 2 and 
	( 
                  (p.typePriceID = 154  and 154 != 0 ) or 
                  ( 154 = 0  )  
        )  and 
	lp.listPriceID = 12 and 
	(
             (iw.warehouseID = 4  and 4 != 0 )  or 
             (4 = 0 )
        )
order by 
     i.itemID desc
